productDisplayName: Peter England Men Elite Lavender Tie
description: Dressing the elite for years, peter england has crafted some of the classiest ties that are made from the finest quality silk and individually handmade by expert craftsmen weavers in a range of beautiful colours and designs that rise your level of sophistication with ease.
